_comment: AML / compliance officer profile. Focused on beneficial ownership transparency, PEP signals, overseas structures, and VAT validity. Low weight on filing admin; high weight on ownership opacity.

_notes._profile: Use for: KYB onboarding, Money Laundering Regulations 2017 compliance checks, suspicious activity detection, counterparty screening.
_notes._diff_from_default: PSC opacity and VAT discrepancy weighted 3. Overseas-director threshold lowered to 25%. Insolvency cares about recency only, not history. Filing admin deprioritised (AML cares about ownership, not paperwork).
_notes._future_hooks: sanctions.block_uk_hmt_hit (HMT financial sanctions list) and pep.block_pep_match (Politically Exposed Persons) will be added when those MCP tools land. Currently not scored.
